pr.title: Record: Per-Sample SLOT + TTT + LR=0.024 + Stride=96 — val_bpb 0.63614 (3-seed mean)

output.summary: Per-sample SLOT fits sequence-specific hidden/logit deltas with LR0.024+stride96 and a frozen-block TTT stage before evaluation.
output.valOnlyReasoning: TTT and per-sample SLOT optimizations are performed directly on the validation/eval sequences, so the training steps occur on the validation shard.
techniques: Per-sequence hidden-state delta + logit bias via 24-step AdamW
Higher LR (0.024) + stride=96 to maximize steps under the budget
TTT AdamW 1ep with first 10/11 blocks frozen to adjust base state before SLOT
